headline: Jim Cramer Believes “Qnity’s Basically a Bet on the Future of Chip-Making”
summary: Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE:Q) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed as he said that the Iran peace negotiations could trigger an oil glut, cool inflation, and pull interest rates down. Cramer highlighted the sharp rise in the company’s stock price, as he commented: I don’t think people understand the scale or scope of the […]
